data.title: Consistency
data.description: Maintains consistent interface elements to streamline user interaction.
data.technical_spec: Uniform design patterns and predictable UI components across the site.

data.title: Feedback
data.description: Provides users with immediate feedback for actions taken.
data.technical_spec: Real-time notifications and confirmations for user actions.

data.title: Accessibility
data.description: Ensures that all users have equal access to information and functionalities.
data.technical_spec: Compliant with WCAG 2.1 AA standards, supporting screen readers and keyboard navigation.

data.title: Simplicity
data.description: Focus on minimizing complexity and enhancing user understanding.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined navigation with an uncluttered layout and intuitive controls.

data.title: User Control
data.description: Empowers users by giving them control over their interactions.
data.technical_spec: Undo and redo options, and user settings that can be personalized.
